message.content:
### 1. RENDERING CHECK  
- ✅ No white/blank screen, broken layout, error overlay, or console errors. Renders correctly.  


### 2. UI ELEMENTS  
- Bottom sheet with drag handle (rounded top corners, partial overlay)  
- Title: "PROVIDER" (top of sheet)  
- Segmented Sub/Dub control: "Subtitled (Sub)" (active, green) + "Dubbed (Dub)" (inactive)  
- List of providers: BEEP, VEE, YUKI, Koto, Neko, GG (all visible)  
- Each provider row: name, badges (★ star rating, "cc" captions icon), short description  
- Selected provider (BEEP): Green/emerald checkmark (✓)  
- Close button (X icon, top-right of sheet)  


### 3. DESIGN MATCH  
- ✅ Dark premium theme: Black background, charcoal cards, emerald-green accent (selected checkmark, active tab)  
- ✅ Mobile-first portrait layout (optimized for vertical scrolling)  
- ✅ Th3-Anime replica: Bottom sheet with Sub/Dub control, provider list, green checkmark on selected item  


### 4. VISUAL ISSUES  
- ⚠️ Missing expected provider: "GG" has no badges/description (inconsistent with others like BEEP/Koto)  
- ⚠️ Provider order mismatch: Expected [Koto, Neko, GG, BEEP, VEE, YUKI], but current order is [BEEP, VEE, YUKI, Koto, Neko, GG]  
- ⚠️ Spacing: Slight uneven padding between provider rows (e.g., BEEP row has more top padding than VEE)  
- ⚠️ Color: "cc" icon for BEEP is white (matches design), but Neko’s "cc" icon is gray (inconsistent)  
- ⚠️ Badge consistency: Koto has a yellow star, but BEEP’s star is blue (design mismatch)
